title: Suspicious HTTP Method Usage
description: Detects use of unusual or dangerous HTTP methods (PUT, DELETE, TRACE, OPTIONS, PATCH) that may indicate API abuse or security misconfiguration. OWASP A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('HTTP Method' = 'PUT' or 'HTTP Method' = 'DELETE' or 'HTTP Method' = 'TRACE' or 'HTTP Method' = 'CONNECT' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PATCH')))
falsepositives: RESTful APIs using PUT/DELETE/PATCH for CRUD operations
